ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a top choice for its rewatchability, atmosphere, and practical effects. It was cited as a favorite and a film users would choose to erase their memory of to experience again.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently listed as a favorite horror movie and a masterpiece of the genre, praised for its tension and iconic status.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for being infinitely re-watchable, a slow-burn horror with immense detail and dread-inducing atmosphere without relying on jump scares.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times for its fun, wacky, and meta take on horror tropes. Often suggested for both horror fans and non-fans alike.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as one of the scariest modern horror films, known for its disturbing imagery and intense family drama.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Often compared to 'Smile' for its mechanics and cited as uniquely terrifying and unsettling, with a premise that deeply affects viewers.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a classic that remains effective and scary even decades after its release, standing the test of time.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a foundational film for many horror fans, blending horror with meta-commentary and kickstarting a popular franchise.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for being one of the few films to make viewers scream out loud, praised for its claustrophobic terror and effective scares.

ranked_movies.title: Paranormal Activity
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for its revolutionary impact and the genuine fear it caused in theaters, creating a lasting cultural sensation.

ranked_movies.title: Barbarian
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its gonzo, unpredictable plot and the intense experience of watching it blind in a theater.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its great atmosphere and building dread, cited as a film that holds up on rewatches.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as a hilarious and cheesy horror-comedy, perfect for viewers who aren't typical horror fans.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a top horror-comedy and a fun, accessible entry into the genre that remains highly rewatchable.

ranked_movies.title: The Wailing
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for its suspenseful ending and being a top-tier foreign horror film that rivets viewers until the last moment.

ranked_movies.title: Talk to Me
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a recent, genuinely scary film, often paired with its follow-up 'Bring Her Back' for its terrifying concepts.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a cult favorite with a strong desire from fans to see lost footage, known for its hellish sci-fi horror.

ranked_movies.title: Poltergeist
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a bonafide classic that tackles childhood fears and remains very rewatchable years later.

ranked_movies.title: 28 Days Later
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a favorite that users can watch repeatedly, praised for reinvigorating the zombie genre with its intensity.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a film that effectively scared audiences and remains a standout example of J-horror remakes.
